title: Sanity
body:
Sanity
An immersive, ARG-inspired modpack designed to keep you constantly on edge.
In this world, there's never a moment to relax—danger lurks around every corner.


🔦 Beginning 🔦

You start game as a player that was already playing game.
You see that you need to save yourself from the situation you are in.
Everything around you wants you dead.

💀 Challenges 💀
  • 🧠 Sanity: [When reality blurs, maintaining your sanity is the key to survival.]
  • 🙂 Depression: [You may feel down sometimes, don't let that end you and take your pills]
  • 🌡 Temperature: [You know about freezing cold... Right?]
  • 👹 Monsters: [There will be monsters... What they want? Who knows? Try to survive and learn.]
⭐ Features ⭐
  • 🎒 Backpacks: [Now you can carry much more items.]
  • 📖 Map: [Helps you find your way.]
  • 📷 Camera: [Capture every eerie moment and start your own monster photo album.]
  • 🔊 Voice chat: [Enhance your experience by communicating with friends during your survival journey.]
Mods You are probably looking for - - 000.jar - The Broken Script - The Knocker - In Your World - The Anomaly - Error 404 Not Found - GoatMan - Dynamic Lights - Embeddium - Mouse Tweaks - Simple Voice Chat - Sophisticated Backpacks - True Darkness - World Host Rest - - What Are They Up To - Who's There?: Ghost Players - Sanity - Schizophrenia - Remove Reloading Screen - Sound Physics Remastered - Sounds - True Darkness - Day Counter - Void Fog - Rainbows - Pretty Rain - Presence Footsteps - Poof Sounds - Ping Wheel - Patchouli - Paper Doll - Out Of Sight - Open Loader - Oculus - Nyctophobia Dread - Not Enough Recipe Book - Not Enough Crashes - Not Enough Animations - No See, No Tick - Modern Fix - Entity Culling - Exposure - Fancy Menu - FerriteCore - Fog - Herd Mentality - Immediately Fast - Inv Move - Just Zoom - KubeJS - Make Bubbles Pop - Eerie Music - Dynamic FPS - Dynamic Crosshair - Drip Sounds - Doctor Who: Wheeping Angels - Dimensional Doors - Depression - Crosshair bobbing - Continuity - Comforts - Cold Sweat - Chat Notify - Chat Immersive Animation - Chat Heads - Catalogue - Canary - Camera Overhaul - Blur Forge - Better Nether Map - Better Forests - Bad Mobs - Antique Atlas 4 - Amandments - Ambient Sounds - 3D Skin Layers
add me on discord if u have something to say: c47r4
